name: Armstrong Olive Quiche
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces frozen hash brown potatoes, thawed
1/2 cup milk or half and half
recipeInstructions:
1. Press potatoes between paper towels to remove excess moisture.
2. Press into 9-inch pie pan to form crust.
3. Brush with melted butter.
4. Bake at 425 degrees for 25 minutes or until crust rim is golden brown.
5. Spread chilies, cheese, and olives in crust.
6. Beat milk with eggs, salt, and pepper.
7. Pour mixture slowly into crust.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 40 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean.
